name: atlas-blob-d1-lipschitz
description: Wave 3 Phase 5c — D1 directional Lipschitz on the 12-Sphere Blob scene. Sanity check: smooth-union geometry has nearly-uniform Lipschitz across directions (the union's gradient magnitude stays bounded by 1 everywhere by the smooth-min upper-bound), so D1's per-direction L should degenerate to ~scalar. Output should be pixel-near-identical to `atlas-blob-orbit` — confirms D1 doesn't regress the smooth-blob path. Pixel-diff baselines approved on first run; tight tolerance because D1 should NOT change anything visibly here.
